name: Garlic Aged Extract
summary: Aged garlic extract has moderate human evidence for blood pressure and modest lipid improvements with a different constituent profile than raw garlic.
description: Aged Allium sativum extract enriched in S-allyl cysteine and antioxidant compounds.
safetyNotes: A specific aged garlic extract was relatively well tolerated in a small 12-week trial of closely monitored warfarin users, without excess serious hemorrhage. Evidence is insufficient to generalize that result to every garlic formulation, anticoagulant or antiplatelet, surgery context, pregnancy, or long-term use.
contraindications: Do not treat anticoagulant use as an automatic contraindication. One small
closely monitored trial found no excess serious bleeding with a specific aged garlic extract plus warfarin
other formulations and unmonitored use remain insufficiently characterized and require clinician review.
